Hero Page.HEADLINE: Your cold chain. Designed around your business.
Hero Page.SUBHEADLINE:
Most cold chain facilities are built for the average client.
Crystal builds for you: your product, your throughput, your compliance requirements, your city.
We design it, build it, and operate it. You focus on your business.
Hero Page.CTA: Talk to us about your requirement

S1 What is BTS?.HEADLINE: Built for you. Operated by us.
S1 What is BTS?.BODY:
A built-to-suit cold chain facility is designed, engineered, and constructed specifically for your operation.
Crystal manages the entire process: from site selection and design to construction, commissioning, and ongoing operations.
You get a world-class cold chain facility without the complexity of building it yourself.

S2 What we deliver.HEADLINE: End-to-end. From brief to operations.
S2 What we deliver.Site selection & design: We identify the right location for your supply chain and design the facility around your exact operational requirements: temperature zones, throughput, compliance, and future scale.
S2 What we deliver.Engineering & construction: Crystal manages the full EPC process, covering structural, mechanical, electrical, and refrigeration, to the highest food safety and pharma standards.
S2 What we deliver.Commissioning & handover: We commission every system, train your team, and ensure the facility is SLA-ready from day one. No surprises. No delays.
S2 What we deliver.Ongoing operations: Crystal operates the facility on your behalf: warehouse management, staffing, compliance, maintenance, and reporting. We own the outcome.

S3 Who this is for.HEADLINE: Built for businesses that need certainty....
S3 Who this is for.BODY: BTS is the right solution if you need dedicated cold chain capacity in a specific location, require pharma-grade or food-safety compliance from day one, want a single partner accountable for design, build, and operations, or are scaling into new cities and need infrastructure that replicates reliably.

S4 Case study.TITLE: Pharma-grade warehouse at JNPT: from brief to live in 3 months
S4 Case study.BODY:
A leading pharmaceutical company needed a fully compliant bonded and non-bonded cold storage facility at JNPT: designed, built, and operational within 90 days.
Crystal delivered a 40,000 sqft facility with segregated temperature zones, CFR 21-compliant monitoring, WMS integration, and full audit readiness from day one.
S4 Case study.OUTCOMES: 40,000 sqft delivered · bonded & non-bonded zones · CFR 21 compliant · WMS-enabled · operational in 90 days

S5 Why Crystal for BTS.20,000+ pallets built: Proven track record of building and operating A-grade cold storage at scale across India.
S5 Why Crystal for BTS.Operational from day one: We don't just hand over keys. We commission, staff, and operate so your supply chain never skips a beat.
S5 Why Crystal for BTS.Compliance built in: FSSC 22000, ISO 22000, pharma GMP, FSSAI. Our facilities are built to the standards your auditors expect.
S5 Why Crystal for BTS.Demand-first approach: We build only when the requirement is confirmed. No speculation. Every rupee of capital is accountable.
